---
title: "Example interview"
subtitle: |
  "An example interview for testing purposes."
image: "/imgs/incise2019_reports.jpg"
image-alt: "A stack of copies of the 2019 InCiSE reports"
date: "2024-02-28"
author: "A N OTHER"
categories:
  - draft
  - example
  - interview

format:
  html:
    toc: true

execute: 
  echo: false
---

Background about the interviewer/interviewee.

:::{.interview}
**double asterisks: denote interviewer question**
*single asterisks: denote interviewee response*

**double asterisks: denote interviewer question**
*single asterisks: denote interviewee response*

Aside between groups of questions.

**double asterisks: denote interviewer question**
*single asterisks: denote interviewee response*

**double asterisks: denote interviewer question**
*single asterisks: denote interviewee response*
:::

<!-- do not remove: always include the footer content -->
:::{.footer-block}
{{< include /_footer.qmd >}}
:::
